violations.text: Working containers of sauces (under the burger line) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC emptied sani buckets, drained and refilled 3-bay sink to proper concentration, and refilled sani buckets during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine -reach-in freezer shelving and gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The walk-in fries freezer in is in poor repair, observed with latch not functioning properly and ice build-up on the condenser fan. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
PIC reported that the wall to the outside (near restrooms) is in poor repair. PIC stated when it rains, water leaks into restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen, particularly the floor/wall junctures and under equipment, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Egg sandwich was observed held at 116 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Manager disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Tomatoes were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. PIC stated tomatoes had been washed then returned to original box. No water was observed on tomatoes, or in box. After washing produce, it must be placed in a clean, sanitized container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils observed stored in an unclean bin with an accumulation of debris. Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on surfaces that are not clean (in dirty bins). New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris on doors beneath food prep areas, cooking equipment, hot hold units, drawers, and counters (especially beneath and between equipment). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The dumpster enclosures have an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. Dumpster enclosures must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The grease recycling receptacle has an accumulation of grease. Grease receptacle must be cleaned or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility including inside the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The light covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
